full_citation: Britt EC, Lika J, Giese MA, Schoen TJ, Seim GL, Huang Z, Lee PY, Huttenlocher A, Fan J. Switching to the cyclic pentose phosphate pathway powers the oxidative burst in activated neutrophils. Nat Metab. 2022;4(3):389-403.
where_used: Results M05: external mechanistic anchor for the glycolysis/PPP/redox axis
notes: activated neutrophils switch to a cyclic pentose phosphate mode powering NADPH-oxidase oxidative burst; disrupting it suppresses burst, NET release and killing. USE ONLY as biological-plausibility anchor for the PPP/redox axis; NOT as evidence that our M05 reflects flux, oxidative burst, NETosis, killing or cross-layer coupling (not co-measured in our samples). Li2023 remains the primary M05 anchor.
